steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is “light from other centuries, only now reaching Earth.” The passage describes light that has been traveling through space and is now arriving at our planet.

steps.title: Match the target meaning to the answer
steps.content: The word must convey arriving at a destination. “Arriving at” does exactly that. The other three choices describe unrelated actions. That is the correct answer.
